description: A sensor in a feed bin reports that the level of a specific feed ingredient is below the reorder point.

nodes.task_description: Receive a low-level alert from the feed bin sensor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the inventory level is below the 20% threshold.

nodes.task_description: Automatically generate a purchase order for a standard truckload of the feed ingredient from the preferred supplier.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the PO for the correct ingredient and supplier.

nodes.task_description: Send the purchase order to the supplier via email.
